app_title: Venezuela 2026 Double Earthquake — M7.2 & M7.5 Information
app_subtitle: Official figures, intensity by area, where to get help and how to stay safe
sismo_doble_banner: ⚠️ DOUBLE EARTHQUAKE: two events ~38 seconds apart ({m1} M{mag1} + {m2} M{mag2}). The intensity map combines both ShakeMaps (maximum MMI per cell).
actualizacion_tiempo_real: 🕒 Shaking intensity (USGS ShakeMap) and casualty figures (GDACS/OCHA) update periodically. Each data point shows its source and timestamp.
impacto_nota: Official alert levels and estimates. Casualty figures are preliminary and vary by source; check the linked reports for the latest.
cifras_disclaimer: ⚠️ Preliminary figures — they vary by source and are updated continuously. Each figure is attributed to its source and date. For the most current data, check the official links.
reportes_oficiales_link: 📄 More figures and situation reports from OCHA/ReliefWeb: [view disaster page]({url}).
desaparecidos_texto: To **search for or register** a missing family member:
desaparecidos_page_intro: How to search for or register a missing relative, plus cases published by official sources.
registros_nota: Use these official channels to register or search for someone. All cases are handled confidentially.
iniciativas_nota: Not official, but verified by international press (CNN, El Nacional). Useful for reconnecting families; they do not replace official channels. Verify the site before sharing personal data.
sin_lista_publica: No public certified list of named missing persons has been released for this event yet. When official sources publish cases, they will appear here with full attribution. In the meantime, use the official tracing registries above.
ayuda_zona_titulo: Hospitals near the most affected areas
ayuda_zona_nota: Select your area to view nearby hospitals, clinics and fire stations, with contact numbers and addresses.
leyenda_zonas: Color by felt intensity (USGS): 🔴 most affected → 🟠 least affected. All zones were affected.
danos_texto: Satellite-observed damage is published by official agencies. View their damage and affected-building maps:
consejos_page_intro: Practical safety guidance following the earthquake. Based on recommendations from Civil Protection, the Red Cross and emergency management agencies.
subtitulo_zona: Felt intensity, hazards and where to get help
banner_sin_shakemap: ⛔ The USGS ShakeMap is currently unavailable. Intensity for this area cannot be displayed until the source is restored.
leyenda_intensidad: 🔴 Heatmap = most affected areas (USGS shaking × exposed population): where to prioritize aid. 🏥 Markers = hospitals, clinics, fire stations and ambulance stations (OSM).
recursos_ninguno: No resources are currently mapped in OSM for this area. Contact Civil Protection (171).
peligro_gf: ⚠️ Geological hazard (USGS): liquefaction risk up to {liq}% and landslide risk up to {des}% in parts of this area. Use extra caution on soft ground and on slopes.
intensidad_barrio_nota: Neighborhood-level data (Nominatim/OSM): USGS shaking intensity, WorldPop resident population and USGS geological hazard scores. For reference only.
atribucion: Data: USGS · GDACS · OCHA/ReliefWeb · OpenStreetMap (© contributors) · WorldPop · Copernicus EMS · UNOSAT · ICRC
clima_expander: 📅 Weather forecast for the affected area — next hours & 2 days
nasa_experimental_caption: 🛰️ Colored dots: {n} buildings with ≥ 50 % damage probability per Sentinel-1 SAR analysis (NASA, experimental, unvalidated in field). Red ≥ 75 % · Orange 50–75 % · Amber < 50 %. Partial coverage.
img_rescatistas: Rescue teams deployed in Caracas and La Guaira — Venezuela, June 2026
img_caritas: Cáritas Venezuela volunteers deployed in the affected areas — June 2026
img_perros: Search and rescue dogs deployed in the affected areas — Venezuela, June 2026
img_donar: How to help Venezuela — donations and humanitarian support
damnificados_stats_nota: ~16,000 homeless: 50% with relatives, 39% on streets or public spaces, 11% in churches/schools. Total affected estimate: ~6.76 M (IOM). Sources: [UNHCR/El Estímulo, Jun 30](https://elestimulo.com/terremoto-en-venezuela/2026-06-30/acnur-alerta-sobre-un-rapido-deterioro-humanitario-y-miles-de-desplazados-en-las-calles/) · [NPR, Jun 30](https://www.npr.org/2026/06/30/nx-s1-5875282/one-chaos-after-another-thousands-left-homeless-after-venezuelan-earthquakes)
damnificados_page_intro: Verified citizen platforms and organizations with active response to the Venezuela double earthquake (Jun 24, 2026).
ver_asistente: Ask the assistant how to use the app correctly
chat_intro: Ask about the areas covered by this app: shaking intensity, population, hospitals and clinics, official figures and where to look for a relative. The assistant answers **only from the real data in this app** and cites its sources.
chat_disclaimer: ℹ️ Informational assistant. It **does not locate people**. It can make mistakes: always verify against the cited sources. Emergencies: 171 or 911.
chat_cobertura: Coverage: Caracas (Libertador · Sucre/Petare · Baruta/Hatillo/Chacao) and La Guaira (coast). Other areas: no data in this app.
chat_pie_ia: AI-generated from the cited sources. Verify the links. Not official advice.
chat_sin_clave: The assistant is not available right now. In the meantime, use the official links:
chat_error_api: The assistant is unavailable right now. Try again in a few minutes or use the official sources.
chat_rate_limit: You've reached this session's question limit. Reload the page later to continue.
chat_ocupado: The assistant is receiving many requests right now. Wait a few seconds and try again.
chat_rechazo_persona: I **do not locate people** or confirm anyone's whereabouts — that is handled confidentially through official channels. To **search for or register a missing relative**, use these channels:
chat_aviso_emergencia: If this is an emergency, call **171** or **911**.
chat_ejemplo_1: What's the intensity and population in La Guaira?
chat_ejemplo_2: What hospitals are nearby in Petare?
chat_ejemplo_3: How many deaths have been reported, and from which source?
